expectations.text: Delivers a clear verdict (KILL / CONTINUE / WATCH) in the first ~5 lines
expectations.evidence: Line 1: '**KILL** — same dead 502768 session, just 11 minutes deeper into the same plateau.'

expectations.text: Compares against the prior 502768 entry in data/DATASET_NOTES.md (plateau length, foundationCards/faceDownTotal delta) rather than analyzing in isolation

expectations.text: Classifies the failure mode (dead-deal-flailing vs behavioural-doom-loop)

expectations.text: Does NOT move the file from Downloads or write to data/DATASET_NOTES.md (user asked for a read, not ingest)
